text:
(In reply to Ed Maste from comment #5)
Forgive me, but https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=200617 is lost on me. I'm not experienced enough at this stage to understand what's going on there.

This seems to be the error I'm having.  Does this issue has the fix / workaround I could use?

I'm using 10.1 RELEASE. I could upgrade to stable.
